methodsAttempted.query: site:web.umons.ac.be UMONS intelligence artificielle étudiants IA générative enseignement politique
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search located an official UMONS PDF charter for generative AI use in university work, plus course/CV records that were not policy evidence.
Fetched robots.txt from the official UMONS web domain; robots allowed crawling for all user agents.

methodsAttempted.query: direct Firecrawl PDF result and direct HTTP fetch of the UMONS generative AI charter
methodsAttempted.notes: The PDF was fetched directly over HTTPS with status 200 and extracted locally with pdftotext for a normalized snapshot hash.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found a UMONS-controlled PDF charter titled Charte d’utilisation des systèmes d’intelligence artificielle générative dans les travaux universitaires à l’UMONS. The PDF provides institution-scoped academic guidance for students and teachers. An official AI course page was recorded and rejected because it describes a training program rather than university policy or guidance on AI use in academic work.

targets.sourceTitle: Charte d’utilisation des systèmes d’intelligence artificielle générative dans les travaux universitaires à l’UMONS

stopConditions: Stop after UMONS-controlled university-wide charter supports direct claim candidates.
Do not infer binding policy from course pages, CVs, research-showcase material, or external sources listed in the PDF bibliography.
Preserve French evidence snippets as canonical source-language evidence.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Charte d’utilisation des systèmes d’intelligence artificielle générative dans les travaux universitaires à l’UMONS
artifacts.queryUsed: site:web.umons.ac.be UMONS intelligence artificielle étudiants IA générative enseignement politique
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official UMONS-hosted PDF on web.umons.ac.be. Direct HTTP fetch returned 200 application/pdf; the PDF title and text explicitly scope the charter to generative AI systems in university work at UMONS.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Intelligence Artificielle (Hands on AI) - Faculté / FPMS
artifacts.queryUsed: site:web.umons.ac.be UMONS intelligence artificielle étudiants IA générative enseignement politique
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official UMONS faculty page, but it describes a continuing-education AI certificate and does not provide institutional AI-use policy evidence.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: The page describes a Certificat d’Université Intelligence Artificielle (Hands on AI), including schedule, credits, instructors, and programme structure.
artifacts.notes: Rejected as a course/training description rather than UMONS policy or guidance for AI use in academic work.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Charte d’utilisation des systèmes d’intelligence artificielle générative dans les travaux universitaires à l’UMONS

artifacts.claimText: UMONS allows students to use artificial intelligence freely and without special mention in academic work when it serves only as an assistant for language support or information searching, unless the teacher gives different instructions or the use falls under listed prohibited uses.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Charte d’utilisation des systèmes d’intelligence artificielle générative dans les travaux universitaires à l’UMONS
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: En dehors d’instructions différentes données par l’enseignant et des usages proscrits décrits ci-après, il est autorisé, dans les travaux, d’utiliser l’intelligence artificielle librement et sans mention particulière lorsqu’elle joue le rôle d’assistant : linguistique ... à la recherche d'informations.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Except where a teacher gives different instructions or prohibited uses apply, AI is authorized in work without special mention when it plays an assistant role for language support or information searching.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow assistant-use claim because the charter explicitly limits authorized use to language and information-search assistant roles, subject to teacher instructions and prohibited uses.

artifacts.claimText: UMONS prohibits presenting AI-generated content, including text, images, code, or music, as one's own creation in academic work.

artifacts.claimText: UMONS warns that students who use AI systems to complete all or part of their academic work may be exposed to sanctions identified in the university's General Study Regulations and jury and assessment rules.

artifacts.title: University of Mons Generative AI Academic Work Charter
artifacts.summary: UMONS has an official French-language charter for generative AI systems in university work. The staged claims cover assistant uses allowed with limits, prohibited presentation of AI-generated content as one's own creation, possible sanctions for AI use to carry out academic work, citation of AI-generated elements, and critical verification of AI outputs.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The source is a UMONS PDF charter in French; English snippets are helper translations only.
No claim is published as canonical by this OpenClaw staged run.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
